episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 355: March of the Machine Aftermath
episode.description: Derek and James bring  you all the latest in Magic the Gathering news and MTGFinance intel including weekly online Meta Analysis, Fast Movers in paper and online, Cards to Watch and a detailed discussion of the March of the Machine: Aftermath set and the TCGPlayer 2022 Top Sellers list.
